category_sources: source_facts.description says Automatic Video Library Manager for TV Shows; official GitHub README describes watching for new episodes and managing TV media libraries.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sickchill; official GitHub repository title and homepage brand use SickChill.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README lists Wiki, FAQ, and installation/configuration as important links; source_facts.homepage is the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GitHub repository SickChill/sickchill is linked from the project homepage and contains the SickChill source.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe automatic TV episode searching, downloading, metadata, and media library management.
